assumptions.title: Output Format Consistency
assumptions.default: Use existing 3-tier rating system (excellent_fit, acceptable_fit, poor_fit)

assumptions.title: Single-File Skill Structure
assumptions.default: Implement as a single SKILL.md file

assumptions.title: Model Selection for Execution
assumptions.default: Use sonnet as the execution model

decisions.title: Scoring Formula Approach
decisions.context: Need to rank 47 models against user hardware. RAM, VRAM, and context length are the key dimensions.
options: A: Weighted percentage — RAM 40%, VRAM 40%, context 20% (recommended)
B: Binary pass/fail per dimension, rank by headroom
C: Single composite ratio averaged across dimensions

decisions.title: Use-Case Filtering Strategy
decisions.context: Models have use-case tags (chat, code, creative, reasoning). User provides a query like 'I need a coding model'.
options: B: Fuzzy match — tagged first, then 'might also work'

decisions.title: Top-N Presentation Count
decisions.context: Need to decide how many models to show in the recommendation report.
options: C: All models above acceptable_fit threshold
